understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place every selectable piece simultaneously onto goal tiles (marked '+') within a limited number of steps, completing all levels of the KA59 puzzle game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used a 3-pixel-per-cell grid. Selected piece moved with MOVE actions; adjacent pushable blocks could be pushed. Walls blocked movement non-uniformly. Selection was switched via CLICK on another selectable piece's pixel coordinates, but could fail if blocked or targeting a non-selectable object.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place every selectable piece simultaneously onto goal tiles (marked '+') within a limited number of steps, completing all levels of the KA59 puzzle game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used a 3-pixel-per-cell grid. Selected piece moved with MOVE actions; adjacent pushable blocks could be pushed. Walls blocked movement non-uniformly. Selection was switched via CLICK on another selectable piece's pixel coordinates, but could fail if blocked or targeting a non-selectable object.
